data.title: Better and Coinbase Launch the First Token-Backed, Conforming Mortgage
data.description: In a groundbreaking partnership, Better Home & Finance Holding Company (NASDAQ: BETR) and Coinbase (NASDAQ: COIN) have joined forces to introduce token-backed mortgages to millions of Americans. These mortgages, backed by Bitcoin (BTC) and USDC, are facilitated by Better, a prominent AI-native mortgage originator, and are supported by Fannie Mae like traditional conforming mortgages. The collaboration marks a significant step towards integrating cryptocurrency into the housing market and expanding financial opportunities for consumers.

data.title: GE HealthCare announces lead industrial role in largest EU-funded IHI consortium to advance cardio-oncology care across Europe
data.description: GE HealthCare, listed as GEHC on Nasdaq, has shared its involvement in the COMPASS consortium based in Europe. The initiative is set to run for five years and aims to enhance precision cardio-oncology care and early detection of cardiovascular risks in cancer patients. The project boasts a substantial budget of €50.5 million and involves over sixty partners, making it a significant public-private partnership in the realm of healthcare technology and clinical advancements.

data.title: PKF O'Connor Davies Announces Collaboration with Asseta AI to Support Family Office Modernization
data.description: PKF O'Connor Davies, a prominent accounting and advisory firm, has revealed a new partnership with Asseta AI, a cutting-edge financial platform designed for family offices. This collaboration signals PKF O’Connor Davies' commitment to innovative family office advisory services by integrating technology solutions. Asseta AI offers a cloud-based platform to assist family offices in enhancing their financial operations in response to growing demands for efficiency. This move establishes PKF O'Connor Davies as a leader in technology-driven family office support.

data.title: Rubedo Life Sciences Announces Positive Preliminary Phase 1 Clinical Trial Results for Lead Drug Candidate RLS-1496 in Patients with Plaque Psoriasis, Atopic Dermatitis, and Skin Aging
data.description: A biotech company, Rubedo Life Sciences, Inc. (Rubedo), based in San Francisco, revealed initial findings from a Phase 1 clinical trial. The trial, carried out at a single center, involved ascending doses and used a randomized, double-blind, vehicle-controlled approach. It focused on patients with plaque psoriasis, atopic dermatitis, and skin aging. Rubedo specializes in AI-driven research for developing targeted cellular rejuvenation medications for aging cells. The Phase 1 trial, recently completed in Europe, showcased promising results.

data.title: Golar LNG Limited - Announcement of filing of Form 20-F Annual Report
data.description: Golar LNG Limited has submitted its Form 20-F for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025, to the Securities and Exchange Commission in the United States.

data.title: Treasure Global Reports 7x ARPU Growth on ZCITY; TAZTE Enters Strategic Redevelopment
data.description: The proportion of high-frequency users utilizing ZCITY has risen significantly to 70%, representing a substantial increase. Additionally, the average revenue per user (ARPU) has demonstrated a remarkable growth, surging sevenfold compared to previous levels. These numbers indicate a substantial increase in user engagement and revenue generation for ZCITY.

data.title: BastionGPT Healthcare AI Assistant Demonstrates 99.3% Accuracy in Peer-Reviewed PICU Study
data.description: In a recent report published on March 26, 2026, by Bastion Intelligence, the developers of BastionGPT, an AI chatbot designed for pediatric critical care, revealed that the chatbot has shown remarkable accuracy and garnered high satisfaction among providers. The study, conducted in a critical care setting, was found to be HIPAA-compliant, ensuring patient data security. The peer-reviewed feasibility study highlighted the effectiveness of the AI chatbot, indicating its potential in improving healthcare practices. This development signifies a promising advancement in utilizing technology to enhance patient care, with significant outcomes in provider interactions.

data.title: Mignon Faget Deploys Zoku Platform to Streamline Jewelry Retail Operations
data.description: A jewelry retailer, Mignon Faget, recognized for its unique designs and headquartered in New Orleans, has effectively implemented Zoku POS and Inventory Management at its gallery sites in New Orleans and Metairie. This move comes as a part of Mignon Faget's transition in retail operations, further enhancing efficiency and customer service. The deployment of Zoku POS and Inventory Management in these two locations showcases the commitment of Mignon Faget to streamline its processes and provide a better shopping experience for its customers.

data.title: VIN Foundation Unveils Improved "New Veterinary Graduate Survival Manual" to Support Early-Career Veterinarians
data.description: Announced on March 26, 2026, in Davis, California, the VIN Foundation, a non-profit organization under section 501(c)(3), has released an updated edition of its New Veterinary Graduate Survival Manual. This free digital resource is designed to aid the veterinary community with helpful programs.

data.title: Cintas Earns Newsweek’s America’s Greatest Workplaces for Entry Level 2026 Award
data.description: Cincinnati - Cintas has been recognized for its dedication to supporting the development and success of entry-level employees. The company's investment in assisting entry-level employee partners in their learning and growth has been highlighted.

data.title: In HelloNation, Real Estate Expert Ginny Fey Shares How to Simplify the Downsizing Journey
data.description: In Traverse City, Michigan on March 26, 2026, real estate expert Ginny Fey from Real Estate One discusses the transition for older adults from feeling overwhelmed to empowered during downsizing. Through HelloNation, Fey offers insight on the importance of strategic planning and appropriate assistance in this process.

data.title: HONEYWELL TO RELEASE FIRST QUARTER FINANCIAL RESULTS AND HOLD ITS INVESTOR CONFERENCE CALL ON THURSDAY, APRIL 23
data.description: Charlotte, North Carolina - On March 26, 2026, Honeywell (stock symbol: HON) announced plans to release its financial results for the first quarter prior to Nasdaq Stock Market's opening on April 23. The company is set to host a conference call at 8:30 a.m. EDT on the same day. Additional presentation materials and webcast details will be available for interested parties to access.

data.title: Resolutions approved at DirectBooking Technology EGM, paving way for improved share capital setup.
data.description: Last week, a record-breaking number of 150,000 people attended the annual music festival held in downtown. Attendees enjoyed performances from over 50 artists across five stages. The event generated over $5 million in revenue for the local economy, with 80% of attendees coming from out of town. Security was tight with 300 security personnel on duty, resulting in only five reported incidents. This year's festival exceeded expectations and plans are already underway for next year's event.

data.title: PhaseV Bringing Integrated AI for Faster Clinical Trials to the Global Stage
data.description: PhaseV, a prominent player in the field of AI/ML for clinical development, has revealed plans to showcase the advancements in utilizing Causal AI/ML to enhance trial design, execution, and patient outcomes. This announcement was made in Boston on March 26, 2026. The company will be presenting these significant improvements in the upcoming spring and summer of 2026. This move signifies a shift towards more sophisticated AI implementation beyond the basic level. With a focus on leveraging Causal AI/ML technologies, PhaseV aims to drive tangible enhancements in clinical trial processes and ultimately improve patient results.

data.title: SurgePays Launches Managed Marketing Services Platform Across Nationwide Retail Network
data.description: It is anticipated that an in-store digital media platform will enhance customer acquisition efforts and generate fresh opportunities for high-margin recurring revenue.

data.title: COLLPLANT BIOTECHNOLOGIES REPORTS 2025 FINANCIAL RESULTS AND PROVIDES CORPORATE UPDATE
data.description: On March 26, 2026, in Rehovot, Israel, CollPlant Biotechnologies announced its latest developments. The company, listed on Nasdaq as CLGN, specializes in regenerative and aesthetics medicine. They focus on creating cutting-edge technologies and products using their non-animal-derived rhCollagen for tissue regeneration and medical aesthetics.

data.title: SEALSQ Well Positioned with Post-Quantum Chips and PKI to Support Wi-SUN Alliance Members in Building Quantum-Resilient Smart Meter Ecosystems Amid Rising Demand in Smart Energy
data.description: In Geneva, Switzerland on March 26, 2026, SEALSQ Corp (NASDAQ: LAES), a prominent player in semiconductors, Public Key Infrastructure (PKI), and post-quantum cryptography (PQC) technology, declared its preparedness to aid the Wi-SUN Alliance and its associates in combating the rising risks posed by quantum computing to smart energy systems. With cutting-edge post-quantum (PQ) chips and complete PKI services, SEALSQ is well-equipped to offer specialized advice and remedies for constructing pathways towards achieving complete quantum resilience in smart meter networks.

data.title: Neurocrine Biosciences Presents First Expert Consensus Recommendations for Tardive Dyskinesia in Long-Term Care Settings
data.description: A recent report outlines a structured method for screening, diagnosing, and treating tardive dyskinesia in long-term care facilities, incorporating the use of VMAT2 inhibitors. An expert panel has established this approach. Through a new post-hoc analysis called KINECT-PRO™, conducted in adults aged 65 years and above, significant patient-reported enhancements have been observed. This analysis showcases tangible improvements in clinical outcomes for this demographic group.

data.title: Amaze Holdings Announces Creator Commerce Media Platform, Designed to Unlock Data-Driven Revenue Streams
data.description: A company based in Newport Beach, California, called Amaze Holdings, Inc. (NYSE American: AMZE), specializing in creator-powered commerce, has unveiled its Creator Commerce Media Platform on March 26, 2026. This launch signifies a strategic move by the company to capitalize on its expanding collection of first-party commerce and audience data.

data.title: Hoth Therapeutics Deploys OpenClaw™ AI Platform to Accelerate Drug Discovery
data.description: On March 26, 2026, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, Hoth Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: HOTH), revealed the launch of OpenClaw™, an innovative AI-powered computational platform. This platform aims to speed up drug discovery processes and improve data-driven decision-making.
